description: Tax Lien and Assessment Recording — records property tax liens, special assessment liens, and tax sale certificates with statutory notice compliance

hard_stops.label: Statutory Notice Period Not Met
hard_stops.logic: Required notice to the property owner of delinquent taxes was not sent within the statutory timeframe — lien is unenforceable

hard_stops.label: Duplicate Tax Lien for Same Year
hard_stops.logic: A tax lien for the same parcel and tax year already exists in the records — duplicate filing rejected

soft_flags.label: Tax Sale Redemption Period Active
soft_flags.logic: Property is within the statutory redemption period following tax sale — owner may still redeem

soft_flags.label: Homestead Exemption on File
soft_flags.logic: Property has a homestead exemption on file — verify that additional consumer protection notice requirements are met
